description: Re-executed TASK-NEXT-FROM-BASELINE-0001 audit authority lock validation following context push event. Confirmed governance/audit_authority_lock.md exists on main branch with comprehensive dual-approval system implementation: (1) Pre-action approval requirement with AUDITOR PRE_ACTION_APPROVED mandate before development execution; (2) Post-action verification requirement with AUDITOR VERIFICATION_CONFIRMED for all ACTION_COMPLETED events; (3) Development execution lock preventing unauthorized code changes; (4) Approval authority matrix with exclusive AUDITOR rights; (5) Violation detection and system halt protocols. Dual-approval governance system operational and ready for ANALYST verification of audit authority controls and development execution restrictions.
